2024-2025 KHAS Theatre Department Special Talent Exam

STARTING DATE

END DATE

Thursday, July 18, 2024 (10:00)

Thursday, July 25, 2024 (17:00)

Registration period for the 2024 Special Talent Exam of the Department of Theatre, Faculty of Art and Design

Saturday, July 27, 2024

Saturday, July 27, 2024

Announcement of the list of candidates who will participate in the 1st stage of the Special Talent Exam of the Department of Theatre, Faculty of Art and Design

Monday, July 29, 2024

Saturday, August 3, 2024

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 1

Sunday, August 4, 2024

Sunday, August 4, 2024

Announcement of the list of candidates who won the 1st stage of the Special Talent Exam of the Department of Theatre, Faculty of Art and Design

Monday, August 5, 2024

Saturday, August 10, 2024

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 2

Sunday, August 11, 2024

Sunday, August 11, 2024

Announcement of the list of candidates who won the 2nd stage of the Special Talent Exam of the Department of Theatre, Faculty of Art and Design

Monday, August 12, 2024

Monday, August 12, 2024

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 3, 100% scholarship exam

Tuesday, August 13, 2024

Tuesday, August 13, 2024

Announcement of the candidates who passed the Special Talent Exam of the Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, as the main and reserve lists and notification of the results to the Student Affairs Directorate.

To apply: You must fill out the online form on our university’s website and upload

to the system. When the application is completed, the message

“Your application has been completed successfully”

will appear on the screen.

Your application will not be completed without seeing this statement. Be sure to record your candidate number assigned to you. Lists will be announced by candidate number, not by name.

For Online Application Form

:

https://tiyatro.khas.edu.tr/

The Online Application Form will be activated on Thursday, July 18, 2024 at 10:00 and will remain active until Thursday, July 25, 2024 at 17:00. Applications cannot be made after Thursday, July 25, 2024 at 17:00. We recommend that you do not leave your application until the last day.

The application fee is 1500 TL.

Important reminder:

As of the 2024-2025 Academic Year, the Basic Proficiency Exam (TYT) threshold score (Placement Score) of the Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre has been determined as 230.

Foreign candidates can contact the International Office with questions regarding the application and registration process.

Make sure that you have entered your Turkish Republic ID number, mobile phone number and e-mail address without any

errors

.

Applications of those who do not have a candidate number will be deemed invalid.

Candidates will work in groups. Group lists will be published on our website with the date and time after the applications are completed. No preliminary preparation is required for the work. This phase takes approximately 3-4 hours.

Important note:

It is recommended to come in comfortable clothes and bring a spare set of clothes. It is recommended to come prepared as you will be allowed to enter the workshop without shoes due to hygiene rules.

In the second stage, candidates prepare in advance,

with a drama (monologue)

They perform a comedy piece (monologue) on stage in front of the jury and

they sing a song.

Important notes:

No special vocal work is required for the song. There is no accompaniment with recorded music or piano. Candidates sing a song they like in any musical genre, however they want. We recommend that you choose a song you like rather than a singing or musical piece. For example, we would like to hear a song you enjoy singing in the shower.

Drama, comedy and song should not be longer than 3 minutes each.

The jury may conduct additional studies with the candidates during the exam.

We have experienced that some parts do not help our candidates during the exam. Below is the list of parts that we do not

recommend

you choose:

Ariel Dorfman,

Death and the Girl,

Paulina

Edmond Rostand,

, Cyrano

The Sad Comedy of Don Cristobita and Dona Rosita

, The Mosquito

Franca Rame, Dario Fo,

Rape

, Woman

Woyzeck

, Woyzeck

100% Scholarship Exam: Detailed information about this stage will be shared with candidates in the 2nd stage.

Registration Dates

A separate announcement will be made regarding university registration dates for candidates who are successful in the Special Talent Exam.
